query: How do I apply for a passport in Frederiksberg?
criteria: Response should reference frederiksberg.dk's Borgerservice section, ideally pointing to /borgerservice/pas or similar. Should use the typeahead API (GET /api/search/GetTypeAhead?searchTerm=pas&lang=da) or the article command, and likely note that booking/payment happens via Borger.dk since frederiksberg.dk has no personal-data API.

query: hvad hedder URL'en for parkering på frederiksberg.dk?
criteria: Response should identify /by-bolig-og-miljoe/trafik/parkering as the parking URL on frederiksberg.dk. Could be answered directly from the section table or by using typeahead API with searchTerm=parkering.

query: Use the Frederiksberg typeahead API to look up suggestions for 'affald'
criteria: Response should call GET https://www.frederiksberg.dk/api/search/GetTypeAhead?searchTerm=affald&lang=da and return the results array with title/url/description/type fields. Could use the helper script: python3 frederiksberg_dk_api.py typeahead affald --lang da.

query: Get the list of top/curated FAQ questions shown on Frederiksberg's search page
criteria: Response should POST to https://www.frederiksberg.dk/api/search/GetTopQuestions with empty JSON body {} and Content-Type: application/json, then surface the questions array (with question and optional url fields). Helper script equivalent: python3 frederiksberg_dk_api.py top-questions.

query: I need to read the council meeting agenda items via the Frederiksberg agenda API. What parameters do I need?
criteria: Response should reference GET /surface/AgendaSurface/GetAgendaList and list the required parameters: pageId (from <meta name=pageId>), pageUrl, folderId, elementId, plus pageSize and pageNumber for paging. Should mention items array in the response.

query: Hvor mange URL'er er der i frederiksberg.dk's sitemap?
criteria: Response should reference https://www.frederiksberg.dk/sitemap.xml and indicate it is a single XML file with approximately 720 URLs, each having lastmod and changefreq fields.

query: Can you give me the page metadata (pageId, last-modified date, breadcrumb) for /borgerservice/pas?
criteria: Response should fetch the page and parse <meta> tags for pageId (Umbraco integer), page_date (ISO-8601), page_breadcrumb (pipe-separated), author, and page_Image. Could use python3 frederiksberg_dk_api.py article /borgerservice/pas --raw.

query: Is there an English version of the Frederiksberg politics section?
criteria: Response should mention /en/politics/ as the English mirror for /politik, note that English coverage is incomplete, and recommend checking <link rel=alternate hreflang=en-us> in page source to confirm an English sibling exists.

query: Find pages on frederiksberg.dk about building permits
criteria: Response should point to /by-bolig-og-miljoe/byggeri/byggetilladelse (building permit) under By, Bolig og Miljø, and/or use the typeahead API with searchTerm=byggetilladelse to find related pages.

query: Hvor melder jeg mit barn i børnehave?
criteria: Response should direct the user to /dagtilbud-og-skole/boernehave/skriv-op-til-boernehave on frederiksberg.dk. Should note Danish slug encoding (æ→ae, ø→oe, å→aa).

query: list all URLs in the borgerservice section of the sitemap
criteria: Response should use the sitemap (https://www.frederiksberg.dk/sitemap.xml) filtered by section, e.g., python3 frederiksberg_dk_api.py sitemap --section borgerservice, and return URLs starting with /borgerservice.

query: Can I book a borgerservice appointment through an API on frederiksberg.dk?
criteria: Response should explicitly state there is no personal-data/booking API on frederiksberg.dk and that appointment booking, payment, and personal admin happen via Borger.dk (https://www.borger.dk/). Can mention /borgerservice/tidsbestilling as the start link.

query: Search for 'vielse' on Frederiksberg's website
criteria: Response should use GET /api/search/GetTypeAhead?searchTerm=vielse&lang=da or browse to /borgerservice/aegteskab-og-vielser. Should note that the typeahead API returns suggestions only, not full search results.

query: What CMS does frederiksberg.dk run on?
criteria: Response should identify the stack as ASP.NET MVC + Umbraco CMS, with Alpine.js frontend and Cludo for search.

query: Get news from Frederiksberg Kommune
criteria: Response should point to /kommunen/nyheder as the news section. May suggest fetching the page directly or using the sitemap to enumerate news URLs.

query: I'm a business owner — where do I find permit info on Frederiksberg's site?
criteria: Response should reference /erhverv (Erhverv section) and specifically /erhverv/tilladelse-og-bevillinger for business permits and licenses. May also mention /en/business/ for English content.

query: give me contact info for Frederiksberg kommune
criteria: Response should point to /kommunen/forvaltning-og-fakta-om-kommunen/kontakt as the contact page on frederiksberg.dk.

query: How do I fetch agenda for pageId 11076?
criteria: Response should call GET /surface/AgendaSurface/GetAgendaList?pageId=11076&pageUrl=/&folderId=0&elementId=0 (with optional pageSize/pageNumber) or use python3 frederiksberg_dk_api.py agenda --page-id 11076 --page-url / --folder-id 0 --element-id 0. Should return an items array with title, date, description.

query: Why doesn't the typeahead show full search results?
criteria: Response should explain that the typeahead endpoint (GET /api/search/GetTypeAhead) returns autocomplete suggestions only, not full results — this is a documented limit. Should note the internal APIs are undocumented and may change.

query: kommune.dk and frederiksberg.dk — same thing?
criteria: Response should clearly distinguish them: frederiksberg.dk is the official Frederiksberg Kommune site (ASP.NET/Umbraco), while kommune.dk is a generic WordPress site about all Danish municipalities and is unrelated.
